lint.command: echo "Checkstyle remains advisory in this review mission; treat the existing baseline as known debt and capture findings in docs/code-review/test-ci-governance.md."

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document a first-class fallback path for review fan-out failures: when `scrutiny-feature-reviewer` subagents cannot start because of model alias/runtime issues, manually review the feature handoff, transcript skeleton, and commit diff, then author the per-feature review JSONs directly and continue synthesis.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both `scrutiny-feature-reviewer` launches for `order-to-cash-review` and `procure-to-pay-review` failed in this run with `Invalid model: custom:CLIProxyAPI-5.4-xhigh`, so scrutiny had to complete both reviews directly in-session and write `.factory/validation/commercial-review/scrutiny/reviews/*.json` manually.
